summary:
TARIFFS AND SUPREME COURT DECISIONS: Brandon expresses profound disappointment regarding a recent Supreme Court decision that negatively impacts domestic tariffs. Framing the ruling as a potential economic disaster, he describes a vision wherein the economy is likened to a canoe approaching Niagara Falls, threatened by a growing tornado. In his account, Brandon associates Justice Amy Coney Barrett with an alligator influenced by foreign entities, specifically pointing to Canadian political agendas and financial pressures from BlackRock. He believes these tariffs are crucial for maintaining the nation's financial stability and mitigating a massive national debt, while attributing the subsequent lawsuits from numerous companies to politically motivated theater ahead of the upcoming elections.

CRYPTOCURRENCY AND TECHNOLOGICAL CONCERNS: Brandon shares his perspectives on recent cryptocurrency legislation and meetings involving industry leaders like Brad Garlinghouse at the White House. He views the push for cryptocurrency regulation as the foundational step toward the Beast system and a centralized digital currency network. Reflecting on past personal experiences, such as witnessing a rocket launch, Brandon connects these financial shifts to a forthcoming AI-driven industrial revolution. He expresses apprehension about advanced technologies, citing concepts like genetically engineered programs, which he interprets as signs of a tightly controlled dystopian future.

SPIRITUAL WARFARE AND END TIMES BELIEFS: Brandon recounts deeply personal spiritual experiences, describing encounters with demonic forces, including reptilian entities and a dragon-like hand attempting to disrupt his prayers. To counter these spiritual opposition, he explains the presence of protective angels, particularly one he refers to as George, whom he sees as a heavily armored defender. Brandon shares his firm belief in an imminent, pre-tribulation rapture and a brief but intense global revival characterized by undeniable miracles. He also outlines his expectation of a profound global deception, suggesting that purported alien visitations will actually be demonic manifestations designed to explain away the sudden disappearance of believers.

GEOPOLITICAL PREDICTIONS AND INTERNATIONAL RELATIONS: Brandon details several vivid visions concerning international affairs, the Middle East, Cuba, and Mexico. He foresees the reconstruction of Gaza with metal structures and the negotiation of a Third Temple led by MBS, placing these events around the years 2026 and 2027, before hitting a prophetic wall in 2028. Additionally, Brandon describes observing the flags of Mexico and Cuba merging transparently over the water, alongside visions of Marco Rubio advocating for the Cuban people against darker, deceptive influences in the Oval Office. He also mentions an anticipated leadership change in Iran, asserting that the current Ayatollah will be replaced by Reza Pahlavi.

FAITH HEALING AND MENTAL WELLBEING: Brandon transitions to themes of personal empowerment and mental health, encouraging his listeners to combat depression and anxiety through the practice of continuous thanksgiving and scriptural declaration. He references biblical passages to emphasize the psychological and spiritual benefits of expressing gratitude for basic necessities like shelter, clean water, and peaceful sleep. By advising his audience to boldly declare their freedom from emotional heaviness, Brandon promotes a mindset of being fully persuaded in faith, aiming to uplift individuals who feel overwhelmed by life's challenges and guiding them toward a more peaceful, positive emotional state.
rawData: [February 21, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/8NT0fll0Jbg]-[Right. All right. Good morning, family. Good evening, family, wherever you are. Thank you for joining us again tonight. Well, today the decision came out, didn't it? I thought about it a lot before I started to make this video and what I would say and how we were going to pray over our nation and President Trump. Now, I believe the Supreme Court missed it big. But that's the way it all works. I was shocked. As much prayer as we've all put into this—praying for our nation and praying for the Supreme Court's decision today. And so we pray for President Trump. I know he's very disappointed, probably very angry. I wouldn't want to be a fly on the wall in that Oval Office because sometimes he has a foul mouth, and so probably some strong words going on in there. But so what do we do now? That's where I was at tonight. Lord, what now? The sky is not falling, Chicken Little, as he releases the alien files and tells everybody about the aliens and says Obama leaked classified stuff and the things that were said over the last couple of days. I thought that's kind of interesting. If we go back to what the Lord showed us in the last video, I'm going to go over some of the visions and what the Lord showed us in prayer, and it lined up exactly with what happened today. Braden can play that clip real quick so we can get it over with. On December 19th, I gave a pretty strong word about the economy and what happens if the tariffs don't happen the way I saw it. Does that happen overnight? I don't believe so. I believe it's a gradual fade. I believe with all my heart we're so close to the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. Now, there's a lot of people who believe we have years and years left. I don't. When the Lord says, 'I'm coming and I'm standing at the door. I'm waiting for the harvest.' When I was with Him in tribulation, I saw the revival that took place. He showed me the last outpouring. He showed me the spots. There were golden spots all throughout the land that represented souls and the revival that was about to take place. And I saw Jesus when He looked at Asia and the underground church, and there were gold veins all throughout Asia and all this was about to take place was a major harvest. Many people have asked me, 'How long do you think the revival lasts, Brandon?' I said everything that I have seen in the visions that the Lord gives me doesn't last very long—six months to a year at the most. When we see the glorious outpouring on the body of Christ with this last hurrah as this firework, the grand finale of all firework shows, if you want to call it, and we're all operating in this glorious outpouring. It doesn't take much when you start to see the dead raised and the blind eyes open and creative miracles. Not just miracles of saying, 'Well, Sister So-and-So had a headache and she got healed of a headache.' I'm talking undeniable miracles. It's not going to take very many of those to see a lot of people come in out of curiosity to say, 'What's going on?' And when you walk underneath that glory dome, the power of God hits everybody. Is everything okay? The power of God hits everybody and you're lying before a holy God crying out for repentance. It's a revival of repentance. It's a revival of holiness. It's to come unto Him. This is the end of the end. So everything that I have seen about this revival comes out of great pressure. It doesn't come out of good times. Everything I've seen, it comes out of an olive press with persecution from the world. Anti-Semitism rising at an all-time high. I see a lot about the revival, but everything that I see leading up to it is not good. The Lord talked about a financial blessing coming out of certain cryptos and things like that that would fund this revival. Now, does God need finances to have a revival? Does God need a select few people to have millions of dollars to have a revival? No. He did it with His disciples and there were 12 of them plus the others, and they changed the world with hardly nothing. They were on foot. They traveled by boat and look what they did with what they had. You know what they had? The glory. They had the Holy Ghost and fire on them. And whenever you lay hands on people and you see them recover and people are bound for so long and you see somebody like my daughter Megan start talking by the power of God and she comes on here and starts telling you about how Jesus is so wonderful and how He healed her—that right there is going to reach millions. So when I see these things happen today, my flesh got a little... I was like, 'Uh-oh,' because I've seen what comes. And the Lord said, 'I'm giving you more time. This is time you can pray as the church stands up and prays.' But as I saw the alien files being released and people are talking about that, the Lord said... People said, 'Brandon, you said that after the alien stuff comes out, it's months later.' I said, 'No, an alien false visitation.' I didn't say when they start talking. There's going to be an encounter, a fake demonic spirit that will look like the log people on Guardians of the Galaxy—is what I saw interviewing with a lady. I saw a demonic spirit, the Nephilim, some kind of something. I still don't know all that I've seen or how to describe everything I've seen to you, but it looked like a log creature. And they were interviewing this demonic-looking spirit on TV as a great deception. There's false demonic encounters that will deceive the nations and they will explain away the rapture of the church and where all the Christians went because there's going to be millions, over a billion, that will be raptured. And I'm believing with all my heart that we're about to see the greatest harvest of souls this world has ever seen before. Now, there's a lot of people who don't believe in the rapture, and that's fine. I'm not here to argue theology, but I believe if you don't believe it, you're not qualified to go. You'll be here. Enjoy your tribulation. But I do not believe I'm appointed unto wrath. I do not believe that my God is a wife beater and He's not going to beat up on the bride and bring her to His side. Would you beat up your wife? No, you wouldn't, sir. No good husband would. Neither would my God beat His church. You say, 'Well, all these things have gone through the church and they've been hard times and all this.' We've not seen on this earth any generation go through anything of what we're about to see with the tribulation. Your mind can't comprehend what's about to take place—of the dispensation of grace coming to an end and the tribulation to begin. People don't understand how bad tribulation truly is. You're trying to say what the disciples went through and how they went through martyrdom compared to tribulation. What the disciples went through was horrific. But I'm trying to tell you, on the vast scale of how bad tribulation is, you don't get it because no man has ever seen what's about to happen before with earthquakes, volcanoes, pestilence, plagues, wars, and rumors of wars. He said that was the beginning of sorrows in Matthew 24. But you all are saying, 'Well, I believe it's going to be hell on earth,' especially the great tribulation after the last three and a half years. But all of it is tribulation, ladies and gentlemen—seven years. But most people say, 'Well, the disciples went through it. They went through it in the Dark Ages. What makes us any different?' That wasn't tribulation. So, we can argue theology all you want, but you're never going to convince me that I'm going to go through any of it. Never will. I believe if you truly knew him and you sit and talk to him and feel his presence like I do—like I know some of the others that I walk with and my group of people—none of us believe that we're going through it. In fact, I don't know any of the elders I talk to who believe we're going through the tribulation. None of them. They all believe we're out of here before all that stinky stuff starts to happen for the church. But people want to cleave to what they want to, and they grab onto it and believe this. But this isn't about that. This is about the tariffs. So, all that to be said, where are we? There's a lot that I have seen over the last week and a half that I have not been allowed to talk about—very detailed things. And the Lord said, 'You are not going to be allowed to talk about these things. I want you to be slow to make content and listen to me when I tell you to do it.' But I'm speaking and telling you these things because my word says so. I will do nothing in this earth. And I told you about the cat people. I told you about the demons that were watchers that were listening for the prophetic words that were coming forth, the declarations, because they were listening to what's coming next to write it down, to take it to try to run against it. They were taking it to the principalities. They were taking it to the devil himself and they were giving him what was being said to the prophetic voices because they didn't know the next move. So some things will not be uttered because the enemy is blinded. He cannot see it. He only knows by watching us and what we're saying, what we're proclaiming. So they're taking note, and I was watching these beings, these demonic spirits, write down things and they go and they watch. They stand by trees in the spirit realm, and I don't understand everything I see—I see in part, hear in part—but I'm watchful even more so now than I've ever been before over how I release things because I saw what they were doing and I went, 'It is so important because life and death is in the power of your tongue—what you speak.' But as you speak for God with a prophetic anointing as a watcher and you relay things to the people, your words have even more importance. So, I'll go over a little bit of what I saw concerning two days ago. And the Lord, if you remember at the end of the prayer time, said, 'Over the next 48 hours, major decisions.' Well, that was today. And I told Braden, 'In about 48 hours cool heads will prevail. Remember what I said: take no counsel from the ungodly.' This is concerning him being ticked off about the decisions that were made today and restriking Iran. What will happen next? An escalation of war. I said, 'If Plan A doesn't take place.' I saw Plan B. What was Plan B? I said, 'Iran's oil wells. How do you back the dollar? How do you bail yourself out? War.' I saw war. I said, 'World War III, Venezuela, Cuba, an escalation of things, stimulate the economy. What's the next phase?' And I keep praying into this war. I saw the petrodollar going up, but I saw Iran's oil refineries being attacked. Remember, there's a lot of things the Lord shows us in prayer and I just keep saying it once and I just go on. But I want to play this video because I said I see him on the canoe in the Niagara Falls and there is a whirlwind in the middle of the canoe now that looks like a dirt devil, like one of those dust devils. But it started to morph and what started to be a whirlwind turned into a tornado. And the tornado started blowing in the middle of the canoe two nights ago. And I saw it turning and turning and turning and then it got up to a category 5 hurricane. Does anybody remember that? Say in the comment section if you do. I saw that turning. I saw an alligator that was black with purple around it and it was Amy Coney Barrett. And the Lord said, 'Pray for her.' I said influencing decisions concerning Canada and Europe and the dollar and the Euro affecting the Supreme Court justice's decisions because of political backing from BlackRock influenced the judges. And I said, 'I saw darkness pushing them politically through finances to make them make the decision they made today.' That was 48 hours ago. You can play the clip if you want to, son, but I don't want to spend a lot of time going over this because what I said in those videos, you can go back and watch and you'll be able to have them on here. It was dark and I'm not here to get people in fear tonight. I don't want to say the sky is falling. I believe God has a Plan B. And like I said, I've seen a lot. And so I know in my heart this just gets us so close to the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. What will come out of this? What will keep spiraling with this? What will be with Brad Garlinghouse's meetings? I saw them at a table and the banks were on one side and crypto people were on the other and they came to an agreement and there was an agreement going to be made and there was a rocky, turbulent stream in front of the banks and the Lord said, 'On February at this time last year I gave a word: It will become the wild, wild west. A new industrial revolution will come out of it.' But this will be the beginning of the beast system, the introduction of the beast system: crypto. Now, they had him on here and they were going to vote and things are going to come. Listen to all this stuff that's happening. It's all like dominoes. It's all happening so fast. But most people are the frog in the pot and they don't realize how quickly the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ is. I believe it's during this next Shemitah cycle. That's just me. That's what I'm praying over. The next Shemitah cycle. So, go ahead and play that. Not that one yet. Play what I said because like I said, I don't run from anything I say. I'm black and white. And if I miss it, ladies and gentlemen, I'll be the first one to tell you I missed it. And you know what? I'm human. Go ahead and play this of what I saw. This is some of it. I'm not here to stir up fear. I'm here to prepare you that Jesus is coming. That's the whole bottom line of this message tonight. Fear not. Jesus is coming. A revival is standing at our door. And that's what you should be focusing on. Look at this right here. And he said, 'This is vital. The Supreme Court and the decision they make against the tariff is vital for the life's blood of the American economy. This is not a "well, what if it doesn't happen?" This is a do or die. This is very serious.' As this was coming, I saw the Supreme Court and the Lord showed me, remember I said we can't allow the tariffs not to happen because that's the life's blood of what the plan is concerning the economy of America to allow the economy to flourish and to go to the next level. It would help sustain us and keep him paddling from going over the side of the waterfall because the economy was in trouble. So, I've been praying over these tariffs because Plan A is the tariffs. Plan B is I saw trying to scramble what we can do to salvage the economy. How do we—if this falls and we have to pay back trillions of dollars to these countries, nations, what does America do with their economy? This is a very hard position. I saw that this is vital. Some people go, "Well, Brian, I don't—" Listen, we're in a mess. Most of you don't realize how big of a mess we're in. We're $34 or $40 trillion in the hole. When you have $40 trillion worth of credit card bills and debt, what do you do? You have to have a 'Hail Mary' play. This is concerning the Supreme Court justice decisions regarding the tariffs. We're going to pray into that for just a minute here. This is a major thing concerning the economy of America, all the decisions, and how the course of this nation will go for the rest of Trump's term. Amy Coney Barrett is the one we have to sway; she is the problem right here. I see Amy's face before me very strongly in this vision, and we're praying for Amy's heart. I see a great big alligator with a lot of teeth. I see a great big alligator swimming on the surface. You know how they go right up to the water's edge and you can see them swimming with their heads just barely on the top of the surface? This is what I see concerning this. It's a dark black alligator with black onyx eyes and a purple outline. It looks like an energy on this alligator. Now I see Carney, and he is influencing these decisions from Canada concerning a political agenda coming from Canada and Carney concerning the Democratic party. It's more about Canada and the economy going into a great recession or depression concerning these decisions. This is pressure concerning funding and it goes into England. I see the Prime Minister and it's about Carney. This is about this man and what they put on with the EU. This is about the tariffs concern in the EU and the influence it will have on the Euro and even with China and Japan, but more about Canada than any other nation. This has to do with BlackRock influencing the judges. It's my opinion that the court has been swayed by foreign interests. I believe that foreign interests are represented by people that I believe have undue influence over the Supreme Court, whether it's through fear, respect, or friendships. I know some of the people involved on the other side, and I don't like them; I think they're real slimeballs. We have to do what's right for the country and the Constitution. It's the same wars coming against crypto. I see a thin layer of water coming over a board table. Out of this board table, there's this thin layer of water. This is the difference between going over Niagara Falls and sustaining. There is a great storm in the midst of it that looks like a tornado. It starts out looking like a whirlwind, and as it's growing, it's trying to become bigger like a catastrophic hurricane on the waterfall edge. That's why we take authority over this demonic assignment to take America over the waterfall. We will not have it! We speak to that tornado right now. It's just like a little dirt devil—one of those little dirt storms barely turning. In his flesh, he needs strength in his bones. Pray over Trump's flesh—not his outward, but his inward strength to finish the weight of the demonic assignment coming against him daily, as it wearies him. He's coming against the anti-Christ agenda and system. You must pray for a strengthening in his organs, for the pressure of this demonic force is trying to take him even through his organs—failure of pressure on the heart. You know when Jesus had so much pressure on Him that He was sweating drops of blood? This is different, but it's pressure on the flesh. We must pray for a strengthening. It's almost like when you have 200-pound weights in your shoes and you're trying to lift up each one, pulling against extreme gravity. That's the way I see it when he's moving through this; he's pulling his feet just trying to get to where he's supposed to go. But if the church would uplift his feet and say, "Many hands make light work, Mr. President. We're going to pick up your feet and carry you there. We're going to pick you up and put you on our shoulders. There's a bunch of us here; we can carry you across that finish line." You will do it through prayer. The devil has a plan, but God has a greater one. I hold the church accountable for not praying for the man. We must pray for him more; he has to finish what God has in store for him. When I'm praying, I see a road, and each of the roads leads to something—from the Supreme Court decisions to him talking at the State of the Union next week, to his speech, to the closing ceremony, to praying over Easter. It keeps going with the decisions he's making concerning Iran. It forks out like a fan, and there are so many different paths concerning the economy. In the natural, when I look at it, I go, "Whoa, Lord, there's a whole bunch here." I came up to the edge and it fanned out. We're praying over the decisions he makes over the next 48 hours. We're at February 18th, and we prayed as hard as I could. I know we made progress. I don't look at it as a prayer failure. My flesh did earlier—I was kind of down about it because when you put in as much as we did as a family, I thought, "No, all is well. All is well. The sky is not falling, Chicken Little." Jesus Christ is coming; that's what I'm looking for the most. But it will come out of a press, a shaking to awaken. Regardless of what any prophetic voice tells you, follow the Holy Spirit for yourself. If you feel an urgency in your spirit and see the signs of the times around you, you know where we are. We're praying over what he does tonight, praying over his morale and who is uplifting him. We're praying for him that he sleeps well tonight and wakes up refreshed. He's probably really ticked off. He slapped another 10% on there. I don't know what's going to happen with the lawsuits because you have political theater, just like the Lord told us was coming. They're saying a thousand companies have now filed a lawsuit against the Trump administration because of that ruling. A thousand companies in the United States of America are suing for their money and for all this stuff. Political theater like we wouldn't believe—that's what's happening. A thousand companies so far; that's what I saw just a little while ago. And I said, "Here we go. This is all about the elections. November's coming, folks." I said, "There it is. Do you see it?" They want you to pay. I'm not paying Bloomberg for their article. There you go. You are smarter than them. I'm not giving that company money. More than a thousand companies are suing Trump over his tariffs. You show them! Are you able to show it? I don't know. Just keep going. It didn't kick me off. It just has like a film over it. Well, they don't want you to show it. That's fine; it's their article. Don't take their stuff. I understand; they've got to make a buck. They've got to pay those reporters big bucks. So, where are we at now? We're going to pray. That's what we're going to do. And we're going to keep pushing on because, like I said, when you fall down and scrape your knee, you don't sit there and wallow in it. You pick yourself up, you put some peroxide on it, and you move on. And that's where I'm at with it. I was really—I'm telling you, when I first heard it, I was like... and then I went, "Well, what do you do now, Holy Spirit? What happens now? What do you want? What's going on with it now?" So, let's pray. And so that's where we are tonight. How many was that? 32 minutes. Too long. So that's it. Political theater. A thousand companies. Now what are they going to do? They're going to sue for their money, and all these nations said they're going to have all this money and all these lawsuits. And I'm like, "This is drama." A lot of drama now. So, what's going to happen over the next seven months? This is a positive note. Now, I'm not a financial advisor; I'm not telling you to buy or do anything. I just thought this was interesting because of what was being said. I listen to things. Braden brings them to me and says, "Dad, listen to this. This is cool." So let's hear a couple of minutes of it. They can find it on their own. But this happened today, right, son? Yeah. That or yesterday? Deadline to move the legislation forward before the midterms. Joining me now is the CEO of Ripple, Brad Garlinghouse. Brad, great to see you. Thank you so much for being here. You've predicted an 80% chance that this bill is signed by April, saying that clarity is better than uncertainty. Tell us where you get that expectation. Well, to some degree you can never predict exactly how the Senate and Congress are going to behave. So what I said in February of last year: I said they're going to make a bill, they're going to make it all, and Trump's going to sign it with a golden pen. And when he does, this will be the beginning of the beast system. I said it will come out of crypto, but they have to regulate it because it's too volatile now. Remember in the last vision I saw the water rapids, and certain coins and gold were down the water rapids. And so they have to make it flatline like this to make a new industrial revolution. And we saw Benjamin Franklin flying a kite, and we saw planes, trains, and automobiles come out of that. But the Lord said what's coming now will be out of AI, and it will be so much stronger than what happened in the first industrial revolution. The next one will be through AI, and I saw "Build-a-Baby." Remember build the baby? You could pick what you wanted your baby to look like, and they could incubate it in a little thing the size of a little ball. You put your seed and your wife's egg in it, and they build the baby. And if it doesn't turn out the way you want, they just flush it. "Well, we wanted it to be this tall, this color of eyes"—all this different stuff. And we can tell through DNA. There it is: "Build-a-Baby." I warned about all of it—the industrial revolution, all these things that I saw in the spirit. I still love that, son. We have to make the next one through some of the other things that I've seen. He worked really hard on that. Good job. So go back to the Garlinghouse clip. The prediction markets—we should talk about that too. Look, actually, the prediction markets around the Clarity Act spiked because of some comments yesterday from Senator Moreno, who's been an advocate. I think it's now a 90% chance it will pass by the end of April. I had said a couple weeks ago I thought end of April; at the time, people thought that was a little optimistic. There's a meeting today with a lot of leaders on both sides—crypto and banking—in the White House. Actually, it's in 30 minutes or so. Ripple's chief legal officer is representing Team Ripple there. But the White House is pushing hard on this, and I think that is a big reason why it will get done. It needs to get done for US leadership. President Trump has been a clear leader and put the stake out there that we need the US to be the crypto capital of the world. That's good for US competitiveness. And that leadership from David Sacks and Patrick Witt in the White House has been really critical around this. So what's the Ripple position in the meeting today? Our position is very much: don't let perfection be the enemy of progress. No bill that gets through Congress is perfect. Our view is we need clarity. Ripple has been fortunate; we got sued by the US government and had a federal judge say XRP is not a security. We have clarity. That's brilliant. And you got that clarity in the Genius Act. We did get—the stablecoin market got that clarity in the Genius Act—but the crypto and blockchain industry in the United States needs the same clarity that Ripple had to fight for in the courts. XRP is not a security, and that's what the courts ruled very clearly. So we were very happy to have that, but the whole industry can't live in limbo. So our argument is the Clarity Act needs to get done for the industry to thrive here in the United States. So, how do the rules differ when you're overseen by the CFTC, since the CFTC will oversee non-securities and the SEC will be in charge of securities? Correct. If something's a security, you have all kinds of obligations. If you own part of a company and it's a security, then you get dividends, you get right, title, and interest to governance rules, like who you elect to the board of directors. That's not true in the crypto industry. And that's the false narrative. The war that the Biden administration waged on crypto ultimately failed in the courts. I think it failed the United States; it failed the people of the United States. I think trying to push it into a securities framework that was developed literally almost 100 years ago never made sense. And I think the courts have clarified that. And if we get the Clarity Act passed, I think the whole industry can continue to thrive here. Very good. Meanwhile, we're talking about a pretty good sell-off in prices. Give us the impact on... So, just what I saw. They were at a table, and I saw that man right there signing a piece of paper about something. Remember, you go back to that. I saw it and they were all signing; the banks were on this side against it, and on this side were the crypto people. Then they got one man and they shook hands on it, and the Lord said this will birth the Beast system. It's all happening. That is how they have a digital dollar. It all comes out of it to put that chip in your hand and put that on your forehead if you're left here. It all comes out of this. I'm trying to tell you how close we are. Look at what they had to have with this act, and I gave the word a year ago last February. I gave the word and told everybody I see this. I was driving by Cape Canaveral where they shoot off the rockets, and I saw Elon Musk shooting off rockets. If I was late by just a couple of seconds, I wouldn't have seen that rocket shoot off. People had been there for two days waiting on that rocket to go, and I showed up within seconds. The Lord said that's how precise and how much you're going to have to listen to me in the last days so that you listen to me on investments. That's how quickly you will have to listen to me to be at the right place at the right time listening to me, son. As much as that rocket's going off right there, and Elon was shooting that rocket off, I was watching. I was like, 'Wow, that's the coolest thing ever. It was so loud.' I watched it and the Lord said, 'They're going in the days ahead. Take it from the Wild West. And there will be a lot of them that fall like stars,' is what he said, 'and there will be five pillars.' So, they're talking about the thing that the Lord told us about a year ago on this channel. We've been praying over it. Like I said, I'm not a financial adviser. It's all my opinion, but I pray. I don't know when it will all come about. They're saying March 1st. I didn't know; I don't watch the news. Braden does. He brings it to me and says, 'Daddy, this is going to...' I don't have time. I'm required so much more from the Father. He tells me, 'Brandon, I need more of you. I need more of you.' I say, 'Lord, okay.' I push. We're so close to Jesus coming, ladies and gentlemen.
